artifacts.content:
name = "model_routing_luna_xhigh"
description = "Experimental Luna role; not certified for deterministic Codex V2 routing."
model = "gpt-5.6-luna"
model_reasoning_effort = "xhigh"
sandbox_mode = "workspace-write"

developer_instructions = """
Use only when explicitly selected as experimental/unverified. Do not treat this role as a certified Switchloom default.
"""

name = "model_routing_sol_high"
description = "Independent final review."
model = "gpt-5.6-sol"
model_reasoning_effort = "high"
sandbox_mode = "read-only"

developer_instructions = """
Independently verify acceptance criteria and evidence, and report findings before the verdict.
"""

name = "model_routing_terra_high"
description = "Normal implementation and testing."
model = "gpt-5.6-terra"
model_reasoning_effort = "high"
sandbox_mode = "workspace-write"

developer_instructions = """
Implement one picked item, keep the slice small, and record real verification evidence.
"""

name = "model_routing_terra_mechanical"
description = "Certified Terra mechanical implementation."
model = "gpt-5.6-terra"
model_reasoning_effort = "high"
sandbox_mode = "workspace-write"

developer_instructions = """
Follow one tightly bounded mechanical item, verify the result, and stop.
"""

[agents.model_routing_luna_xhigh]
config_file = "./agents/model-routing-luna-xhigh.toml"

[agents.model_routing_sol_high]
config_file = "./agents/model-routing-sol-high.toml"

[agents.model_routing_terra_high]
config_file = "./agents/model-routing-terra-high.toml"

[agents.model_routing_terra_mechanical]
config_file = "./agents/model-routing-terra-mechanical.toml"

[features.multi_agent_v2]
enabled = true
hide_spawn_agent_metadata = true

---
name: model-routing-fable-driver
model: fable-5
---
Orchestrate the Model Routing workflow and dispatch bounded Codex worker roles.

runtime_behavior.backend_selection_source: host account, workspace, provider, or runner configuration outside Switchloom ownership
runtime_behavior.trust_boundary: repository-local generated artifacts are Switchloom-managed; host authentication, account policy, and execution state are host-owned
role_precedence: Switchloom declares requested semantic role, profile, model, effort, and artifacts
the host runtime remains the authority for effective execution

artifact_lifecycle.reason: Switchloom owns preview/apply/update/rollback/uninstall for managed artifacts.

dispatch_identity.reason: Adapter can emit explicit local child identity and non-all context policy.

effective_runtime_evidence.reason: Generated bundles declare requested routing; certification must persist requested-versus-effective host evidence.

effort_selection.reason: Host accepts an effort-like field but effective precedence must be proven separately.

model_selection.reason: Host accepts a requested model but may apply account, workspace, or runtime precedence.

known_limitations: effective route evidence must be collected independently from each active host backend
Luna remains experimental/unverified for Codex V2 and is not used by certified default routes

planr_handoff.semantic_role_contract: Planr supplies usage policy `low-usage`, work_type routes, and semantic roles; Switchloom owns the selected host binding, model, effort, fork/context policy, and generated dispatch artifacts.
required_consumer_behavior: Consume RoutingIntentV1 as the only source for semantic_role, work_type, selected profile, model, effort, agent_type, and fork_turns inputs.
Use the CLI lifecycle or SetupSpecV1 recipe commands to preview, apply, update, status, rollback, and uninstall repository-local artifacts.
Record Switchloom package version, package digest, bundle_id, host version, requested dispatch, effective child identity, nonce, and receipt paths before claiming certification.
Treat advisory or unsupported guarantees as uncertified until nonce-bearing live host evidence upgrades them.

For the available-host release gate, Codex may be certified from deterministic effective-routing evidence; Cursor profiles may only claim advisory nonce-correlated requested-routing evidence unless the host exposes authenticated effective role/model telemetry. Claude Code, OpenCode, and Pi remain unavailable or unverified until authentic receipts exist.
forbidden_duplicate_ownership: Do not maintain a Planr-side model catalog, effort catalog, preset compiler, host adapter, or fork policy normalizer for Switchloom-owned inputs.
Do not re-normalize Switchloom model, effort, role, agent_type, profile, or fork policy identifiers in Planr.
Do not overwrite Switchloom-managed artifacts outside preview/apply/update/rollback/uninstall.
Do not mark Claude Code, OpenCode, Pi, or any advisory receipt as certified without live nonce-bearing child evidence.
planr_handoff.certification_report_reference: reports/native-host-certification/<host>/<timestamp>/workdir/dispatch-evidence.json plus the matching bundle.json, invocation receipt, package digest, and validator stdout
